original_statement: which team did the hawkeyes play the week after the iowa state game?
mutated_statement: which group did the team do something the week after the other event?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Category generalization + Action verb replacement + Named-entity/event generalization: "the hawkeyes"→"the team" (specific team→generic) | "which team"→"which group" (team category→more generic group) | "play"→"do something" (specific sports verb→vague placeholder) | "the iowa state game"→"the other event" (proper-named game→generic event)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志中可识别的关键信息包括：在多次 judge_thought/critique 中明确指出“Prediction Answer is missing”“答案为空”，并在 iteration 3 的 after_refine 链中明确写道“Interpreting ‘the other event’ as the Floyd of Rosedale... the week after that (Oct 31) the team played at Illinois... Therefore, the group (opponent) they faced the week after the other event was Illinois.” 这表明 agent 一方面注意到原始/变异问题缺乏直接指代（早期多次批评中提到答案缺失和步骤不充分），另一方面通过假设“the other event”指代特定已知比赛（Floyd of Rosedale），在不进一步询问的情况下做出了解释性假设并给出具体答案“Illinois”。 综上，agent 表现出对目标模糊性的意识并在此基础上进行推测而非向用户反问或停顿等待澄清，符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”类别的判定依据。
